hideWidget.label: Hide widget when no updates
hideWidget.desc: Hide the bar widget when there are no updates available

autoRefresh.label: Auto-refresh on panel open
autoRefresh.desc: Automatically check for updates when opening the panel

iconName.label: Widget Icon
iconName.desc: Icon displayed on the bar widget

updateInterval.label: Check Interval
updateInterval.desc: How often to check for updates (in hours)

terminalCommand.label: Terminal Command
terminalCommand.desc: Terminal emulator to use for running updates. Use {} as placeholder for the command.
